text.tspan: // Both groups are CONTIGUOUS in the sorted list!
// Both groups are CONTIGUOUS in the sorted list!
// parent = bucket & (bucket - 1) // Clear lowest set bit
// Bucket 4's parent = 4 & 3 = 0 → S4 inserted after S0
// Bucket 5's parent = 5 & 4 = 4 → S5 inserted after S4
// Initialization is RECURSIVE: ensure parent exists first
// parent = bucket & (bucket - 1) // Clear lowest set bit
// Bucket 4's parent = 4 & 3 = 0 → S4 inserted after S0
// Bucket 5's parent = 5 & 4 = 4 → S5 inserted after S4
// Initialization is RECURSIVE: ensure parent exists first

div.p: S0, S1, ... = Sentinel nodes (bucket markers) K4, K8, ... = Data nodes (key-value pairs) so_key = reverse_bits(hash) | REGULAR_BIT RED sentinels = Newly inserted during resize Data nodes NEVER move — only sentinels are added
